title: BmFont
description: A loaded BMFont asset: the parsed descriptor plus all page textures. Loaded by the built-in BMFont factory — no extra setup required. Pass directly to BitmapText. ```ts const font = await loader.load('fonts/ui.fnt'); // BmFont via extension const font = await loader.load(BmFont, 'fonts/ui.fnt'); // explicit token const label = new BitmapText('Score: 0', font); ```

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A loaded BMFont asset: the parsed descriptor plus all page textures.
Loaded by the built-in BMFont factory — no extra setup required. Pass directly to BitmapText.

```ts const font = await loader.load('fonts/ui.fnt'); // BmFont via extension const font = await loader.load(BmFont, 'fonts/ui.fnt'); // explicit token const label = new BitmapText('Score: 0', font); ```

members.name: new
members.signature: new(fontData: BmFontData, textures: readonly Texture[]): BmFont
